title: How can I check item specifications and/or compare different listings of the same item?
bodyHtml:
Sometimes you need to double-check item specifications or compare different listings of the same item.

To make this easier for you, we’ve added 2 tabs on the “Listing detail” page:
  • Item specifications
  • Similar listings
To find these tabs, log into your Back Office > “Listings” > select a listing to see the “Listing detail” page > “Item specifications” or “Similar listings.”

Under the “Item specifications” tab, you’ll be able to see the device details like its category ID and name, brand, EAN, height, width, etc.

Under the “Similar listings” tab, you’ll be able to keep track of your inventory and see the appearance grades of all similar listings. You can access each similar listing by selecting the “See listing” button.
